LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JOHN C. POH, JR.'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDATE; WRIT OF MANDATE, AND COMPLAINT FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF (PER STIPULATION & ORDER OF 10/27/09). HEARING HELD. AFTER HEARING ARGUMENT OF COUNSEL, THE COURT RULES THAT THE MATTER IS SUBMITTED FOR DECISION. COUNSEL FOR RESPONDENT REQUESTS A STATEMENT OF DECISION. THE COURT ORDERS THAT BOTH SIDES ARE TO PREPARE PROPOSED STATEMENTS OF DECISION FOR THE COURT BY 2-10-2010. FEBRUARY 10, 2010 WILL ACT AS THE SUBMITTED DATE FOR THE COURT'S PURPOSES. (THE COURT RETAINS THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD PREVIOUSLY LODGED.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
PETITIONER JOHN C. POH, JR.'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE, TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON FEBRUARY 10, 2010 IS GRANTED. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD

Petitioner John C. Poh, Jr.'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate (Per Stipulation & Order Of 10/27/09)
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Continued To Feb-10-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner John C. Poh, Jr.'s Petition for Writ of Administrative Mandate; Writ of Mandate, and Complaint for Declaratory Relief (Per Stipulation & Order of 10/27/09). Appearances: Warren R. Webster, Esq. Hanson Bridgett (415) 777-3200 appearing for Petitioner and moving party; Kim M. Settles, Deputy Atty. Gen., Dept. of Justice, (510) 622-2138 appearing for Respondent and opposing party. Hearing held. After hearing argument of counsel, the Court rules that the matter is submitted for decision. Counsel for Respondent requests a Statement of Decision. The Court orders that both sides are to prepare proposed statements of Decision for the Court by 2-10-2010. February 10, 2010 will act as the submitted date for the Court's purposes. (The Court retains the Administrative Record previously lodged.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
